summary: Tested terminology rename (Wishlist→Dream Items, Wantlist→Actively Seeking, Wishlist Value→Dream Value) and feed card overlay styling. All main terminology changes verified in CollectionPage.js, ISOPage.js, ProfilePage.js. Feed overlay code reviewed and confirmed correct in PostCards.js.

notes: The feed overlay pills (variant and rating) are implemented correctly in the code with the specified frosted glass styling. However, no posts in the current feed have the color_variant or honeypot_rating data populated, so the pills were not visually displayed during testing. The code implementation is correct and will show the pills when posts have that data.
